tasks.title: Initialize shadcn/ui and install dependencies
tasks.description: Run shadcn init, install @tanstack/react-query, react-hook-form, zod, @hookform/resolvers, next-themes, lucide-react, date-fns

tasks.title: Create API client layer
tasks.description: Create src/lib/api/client.ts with fetch wrapper, auth interceptor, token management. Create domain-specific API modules for auth, contacts, catalog, pipeline, agenda, campaigns, notifications, activities

tasks.title: Create auth context and protected route layout
tasks.description: Create src/contexts/auth-context.tsx with login/register/logout/refresh logic. Create (dashboard) layout with sidebar navigation and header

tasks.title: Build sidebar and header components
tasks.description: Responsive sidebar with nav links, user menu, dark mode toggle. Header with breadcrumb and notification bell

tasks.title: Build login and register pages
tasks.description: Auth pages under /auth/login and /auth/register with zod validation, error display, redirect on success

tasks.title: Build dashboard page
tasks.description: Stats cards (total contacts, active opps, conversion rate, won this month), recent activity list, upcoming agenda events

tasks.title: Build contacts list page
tasks.description: Table with search input, pagination, source filter dropdown. Create/edit contact dialog with form validation

tasks.title: Build contact detail page
tasks.description: Contact info card, linked opportunities list, activity timeline, document list sections

tasks.title: Build pipeline kanban board
tasks.description: Drag-and-drop kanban with 7 columns (stages). Opportunity cards show name, program, advisor. Detail modal on click. Stage change on drop

tasks.title: Build catalog pages
tasks.description: Three pages: faculties, programs (filtered by faculty), cohorts (filtered by program). All with CRUD dialogs

tasks.title: Build agenda page
tasks.description: Calendar view with month/week/day toggle. Event creation dialog. Events displayed on calendar with type colors

tasks.title: Build campaigns, activities, notifications pages
tasks.description: Campaigns list with status badges, activities feed with filters, notifications with read/unread toggle

tasks.title: Deploy and verify frontend
tasks.description: Push changes, redeploy web service on Railway, verify all pages work with real API data
